title: ophiopogon stenophyllus
intro: Ophiopogon stenophyllus, also known as the Ruscus stenophyllus or Chinese snake's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which can help to reduce swelling and promote urination. The health benefits of Ophiopogon stenophyllus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a decoction or made into a tincture, and it is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
